word.tr_en: here and there; this way and that way; all over
word.tr_de: hier und dort; hierher und dorthin; überall
Überwindung; Bewältigung; etw. unter Kontrolle bringen

word.tr_en: regarding as important; putting emphasis on
word.tr_de: als wichtig erachten; Betonung auf etw. legen
Erwartung; Vorhersage; vermuten, dass es passiert

word.tr_en: example / simile; metaphor; allegory; fable; parable
passing through (a tunnel, station, town, etc.); passing by (e.g. of a typhoon); transit; passage (of a bill, e.g. through parliament); carriage; passing (an examination, inspection, etc.); clearing

circle; entirety; whole; full; complete; money; dough; moola; enclosure inside a castle's walls; soft-shelled turtle; suffix for ship names; suffix for names of people (esp. infants); suffix for names of swords, armour, musical instruments, etc.; suffix for names of dogs, horses, etc.
contents; content; substance; matter; detail; import

profit; gains; benefit; advantage; interest (of the public, etc.); grace (of God, Buddha, etc.) (esp. as attained through rightful actions, prayer, adherence to one's faith, etc.); blessing; miracle; Profit (economics)
effect; effectiveness; efficacy; result; effects (e.g. sound effects, visual effects, special effects)

word.hint_en: noun; only applies to じょしゅ

word.tr_en: wife; Mrs; madam; wife of a nobleman (aristocrat, etc.); consort of the emperor
word.hint_en: noun; only applies to ふじん; only applies to はしかし; noun; only applies to ふじん; only applies to ぶにん

word.tr_en: pole; rod; stick; baton / line; dash / spoken monotonously

word.hint_en: noun; noun, used as a suffix

word.tr_en: lost child; lost person; stray child; missing child
peculiarity; uniqueness; characteristic / understood only by oneself
word.hint_en: noun; noun; na-adjective (keiyodoshi) / noun; noun; na-adjective (keiyodoshi); only applies to 独得

mountain climbing; mountaineering; ascent of a mountain
custom; practice; habit; usual / said; aforementioned / instance; example; case; illustration; usage / precedent

word.tr_en: gratitude; manners; etiquette; bowing; reward; gift; ceremony; ritual
conclusion (of an argument, discussion, study, etc.)
guarantee; security; assurance; pledge / warranty / co-signing
word.hint_en: noun; suru verb; v.t. / noun; suru verb; v.t.; only applies to 保証

word.tr_en: amendment; correction; revision; modification; alteration; retouching; update; fix

resistance; opposition; standing up to / reluctance; repulsion; repugnance / resistance; drag; friction / electrical resistance / resistor

word.tr_en: operation; management; handling / manipulating (to one's benefit); manipulation; influencing
pole / climax; extreme; extremity; culmination; height; zenith
fault; defect; flaw; weak point; weakness; shortcoming; drawback / failure (in an examination); failing grade
job; work; employment; occupation; position / duties / trade; skill
word.hint_en: noun; noun, used as a suffix

word.tr_en: skin / body (in the context of intimate bodily contact) / surface; grain (e.g. of wood); texture / disposition; temperament; character; type
word.hint_en: noun / noun; noun, used as a suffix

word.tr_en: armpit; under one's arm; side; flank / beside; close to; near; by / aside; to the side; away; out of the way / off-track; off-topic / deuteragonist; supporting role / second verse (in a linked series of poems)
author (usu. of a particular book); writer
defeat; loss; losing (a game) / failing to live up to (one's name, looks, etc.) / discount; loss (on a sale)
contribution (furthering a goal or cause); services (to a cause) / paying tribute; tribute
companion; company / tritagonist; second supporting character
association (of ideas); being reminded (of something); suggestion
advancing to the next stage of education; going on to (high school, college, etc.)
office work; clerical work; administration; business; affairs
candidate; contender; prospect; pick; choice; list / candidacy; candidature; nomination
type; pattern; model; epitome; exemplar; archetype; perfect example
denial; negation; repudiation; disavowal / negation / NOT operation
breathing; respiration / knack; trick; secret (of doing something) / harmony; balance; synchronization; accord / short interval; short pause / Breathing
(social) position; status; standing / position (in a company, organization, etc.); post; rank
district; area; zone; quarter; section; region
judgement; judgment; decision; verdict; sentence / refereeing; umpiring; judging / judgement (of God) / referee; umpire; judge
thoroughness; completeness; consistency / thorough enforcement; seeing to it that a policy, etc. is carried out without exception
